reviews.review_description:
I love this app! I'd loved to learn a anatomy like this. And, if I was a profesor, a would certainly use this in class.

But! Very small things that I hope are not hard to fix, and would make the experience much better. Please fix:

1. When you finish a puzzle. You never get the 100%.
2. The "magnets" that attach the pieces are, sometimes, so hard to get the exact spot. That become frustrating. Is not that o don't know where the piece is, is just that it doesn't fit. So play as a time runner become imposible.

Please pleaaaase fix 2 bugs. And the experience will be much much better

Great educational fun overall!
However,  I found some issues during building my lovely skeleton in easy mode:
1) Some description texts are mixed up within left and right items (patella, 12th rib)
2) It's not possible to complete the round: once I add a last bone, the timer stops and shows 96/98 percent completeness. Very frustrating.
Apart from that, I really enjoy the game, thanks to the developer!

reviews.review_title: Good controls. Not great part placement
reviews.review_description: It's great to use. When you get a part close to where it goes, it glows yellow to show you correct rotation placement which clicks into place when you get it just right. This is also the problem... sometimes certain parts have to bee seemingly within .001 percent of where it goes before it shows you that you're close. Sometimes you know exactly where it goes but the rotation may be barely off and never get to place the part. I understand you need to know which way the bones are turned but it's very difficult to get the bones to place on time on easy difficulty let alone hard mode. I got this for my wife because she is in xray program. I don't really care to be fast at piecing the puzzle together. The accuracy of bone position isn't necessary past a certain point. Maybe an adjustment of the yellow glow proximity  needs to be increased. I wish there was a mode to just walk around the skeleton with all of the bones labeled as well.
Great price for a sort of 3D medical puzzler.  Hard on easy level but a great challenge   Try it

It’s a very nice, educational game. I got it cause I love learning, and this puzzle makes it fun. However, I just wish there was an option of looking at a fully assembled body, where you could pick and pull apart the organs or bones yourself to learn them, untimed, prior to going into puzzle mode. I’m still giving it 5 stars for its educational value. Not many games provide that. Thank you developers, and please try to make this possible.
I learned quickly how little I knew about the body . Well worth the price . Thanks dev
